---
title: "Causal Inference: From Theory to Practice"
subtitle: "BIO-004 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "The rigorous mathematical framework for drawing causal — not merely associational — conclusions from data. Covers both the potential outcomes framework and structural causal models."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Causal Inference: From Theory to Practice

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
